creator: info@juanmolina.eu
text:
It’s been a long time since the Firefox port was updated to version 33, but it is consistently failing for FreeBSD-10 under i386, including the quarterly branch :
http://beefy1.isc.freebsd.org/build.html?mastername=10i386-quarterly&build=2014-11-05_16h05m07s
http://portsmon.freebsd.org/portoverview.py?category=www&portname=firefox&wildcard=

The port is being ignored with this error:
is marked as broken: Cannot build with OPTIMIZED_CFLAGS option due to a clang bug: unset the option or use FAVORITE_COMPILER=gcc in Makefile.local/make.conf
